title: Error-Correcting Codes: The Foundation of Code-Based Cryptography
description: Master the theory of error-correcting codes that underlies post-quantum code-based cryptography. Learn linear codes, generator and parity-check matrices, syndrome decoding, and the hardness of decoding random codes.
learningObjectives: Understand linear codes and their algebraic structure
Explain why decoding random linear codes is computationally hard
Compare different code families used in cryptography
